series_metadata.series_title: Legal Research Files, Research Memorandum and Attorney Work Papers
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain memoranda of law.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
